title: It Happened Here
writer: Kevin Brownlow, Andrew Mollo, Dinah Brooke
actors: Pauline Murray, Sebastian Shaw, Bart Allison
plot: In 1940, Germany invades Britain and transforms it into a Fascist state where some Britons collaborate and others resist. In 1944, Pauline, an apolitical Irish nurse becomes a reluctant player in the fight between the two sides.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award3 wins & 1 nomination total
